axis: Re-derive psi_log_analyzer.sh that ω-network-3 designed but did not persist (artifact loss between agent run and commit attempt)

predecessor.lossage: ω-network-3 designed and validated psi_log_analyzer.sh (142 LOC bash+awk, --recommend flag); file did not land on disk; closure JSON survived as the design source of truth

analyzer_lang: bash + awk (single-pass per-host stats, insertion-sort percentile)
loc_delta_vs_design: +55 (design budget ~142; actual 197 due to comment header + TSV summary block + insertion-sort inline + readable awk formatting). Functionally equivalent to design.

fields_consumed: recommendation_policy (min_count_for_recommendation=50, tight rule p95+5 cap 95, generous rule max+10 floor 30, ok=KEEP, else KEEP+insufficient_data)
tsv_format ISO_ts \t host \t psi_avg10 \t threshold \t outcome \t reason

empty_log.expected: no data: log file empty (<path>), exit 0
empty_log.actual: no data: log file empty (/tmp/psi_empty_<pid>.log), exit 0

missing_log.expected: no data: log file not found (<path>), exit 0
missing_log.actual: no data: log file not found (/tmp/psi_missing_<pid>.log), exit 0

fixture.host_a: 50 idle rows in [0.0,29.5], all accept, threshold=80
fixture.host_b: 60 mid-high rows in [60.0,90.0], reject when psi>=80 (~33%), threshold=80
fixture.host_c: 10 mid-range rows in [20.0,55.0], all accept, threshold=80

operator_loop: 1. Allow log to accumulate (passive — emitted by hexa_remote on every PSI probe per ω-network-2 instrumentation)
4. Review RECOMMEND lines — sanity-check against operational knowledge
5. If suggestion accepted, manually export per-host env (e.g. HEXA_REMOTE_PSI_THRESHOLD_HETZNER=92) — wiring deferred to ω-network-4

reading_modes.default: human-readable per-host table + TSV summary block (lines prefixed '# TSV')
reading_modes.--recommend: all of default + RECOMMEND lines (count >= 50 gated)

recommendation_workflow.log_rotation_note: No rotation implemented (per ω-network-3 design). Operator may truncate via ': > /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log' or wait for ω-network-4 to add a policy.

constraints_honored.session_hexa_only: analyzer is shell+awk (acceptable per shell-tool convention noted in design); no live ssh probes initiated

rollback.blast_radius: ZERO — analyzer is read-only over the TSV log; removing the file removes only operator tooling. No daemon, no rebuild, no env mutation persisted.

next_cycle_unchanged.trigger: per-host count >= 50 in /tmp/hexa_remote_psi.log AND analyzer --recommend produces non-KEEP suggestions for >=2 hosts
next_cycle_unchanged.see: /Users/ghost/core/anima/state/omega_network_3_psi_analyzer.json (next_cycle block) — 3b is purely a re-derivation, scope unchanged
